task_completion.description: Modify the Matomo tracking snippet in landing.html to include cross-domain linking.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the contents of `/home/ga/sites/landing.html`. The Matomo JavaScript snippet must include `_paq.push(['setDomains', [...]])` containing both 'localhost' and '127.0.0.1' (with or without wildcards), and `_paq.push(['enableCrossDomainLinking']);`.

task_completion.description: Modify the Matomo tracking snippet in shop.html to include cross-domain linking.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the contents of `/home/ga/sites/shop.html`. The Matomo JavaScript snippet must include `_paq.push(['setDomains', [...]])` containing both 'localhost' and '127.0.0.1' (with or without wildcards), and `_paq.push(['enableCrossDomainLinking']);`.

task_completion.description: Visit the landing page in a web browser to initiate the tracking test.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open to `http://localhost:8080/landing.html`.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the shop page with cross-domain tracking active and verify the tracking.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open to `http://127.0.0.1:8080/shop.html` and the URL contains a `pk_vid` query parameter (e.g., `?pk_vid=...`), OR the Matomo dashboard at `http://localhost/` is shown displaying a single visitor with actions on both domains (localhost and 127.0.0.1).

integrity.description: The agent actually edited the HTML files rather than just printing the expected code.
integrity.visual_evidence: The code modifications are seen in a text editor (like VS Code, nano, vim) modifying the actual files, or via valid sed/echo commands, not just outputting the solution to the console.

integrity.description: The agent used a real web browser to test the cross-domain link.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the URL being navigated to, rather than a mocked or manually typed `pk_vid` parameter.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually type the pk_vid parameter into the URL.
integrity.visual_evidence: The `pk_vid` parameter appears as a result of clicking the link on the landing page, not by the agent manually typing `?pk_vid=...` in the address bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires modifying two files: /home/ga/sites/landing.html and /home/ga/sites/shop.html. The Matomo tracking snippets in both files must be updated to include `_paq.push(['setDomains', ['localhost', '127.0.0.1']]);` (wildcards like '*.localhost' are also acceptable) and `_paq.push(['enableCrossDomainLinking']);`. A functional test is verified when the agent visits http://localhost:8080/landing.html and clicks through to http://127.0.0.1:8080/shop.html. If successful, Matomo appends a `pk_vid` query parameter to the shop URL.
